name: onesearch
description: Onesearch CLI workflow and provider bridge skills for Codex workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Onesearch CLI and provider bridge skills.
interface.longDescription: A standalone local plugin for Onesearch CLI 0.2.1 workflows. It bundles the main Onesearch router skill plus workflow skills for search, fetch, documentation lookup, and deep research, alongside provider skills for Context7, Exa, Tavily, Firecrawl, DeepWiki, AnySearch, and Zhipu.
defaultPrompt: Use $onesearch-search or $onesearch-fetch for source and evidence workflows.
